claims.label: confirmed

claims.label: confirmed

claims.label: absent

claims.label: confirmed

missed_changes: Large new enthusiasm for AI/LLMs/AGI and AI+crypto convergence (open-source model advocacy, GPT bots, '0-person unicorn', AGI-before-Mars) — entirely unanticipated by the prediction
Web3/on-chain gaming became a major focus: led a16z's seed into CCP's EVE-universe game and highlighted on-chain games as the top transaction driver (23x DeFi)
Decentralized social networks as a specific area of excitement (Farcaster ecosystem, XMTP) beyond the generic 'on-chain social' mention

Strong open-source-software ethos: shipped/championed a16z crypto open-source tooling (Helios, Magi, Halmos, zkdrops, Powers of Tau) and client diversity — 'open source is the only way to preserve the flame'
New emphasis on smart-contract programming languages and formal verification/symbolic testing (Move, Solidity/Huff/Yul, Halmos)
notes: Window covers 2023-01 to 2023-06; co-authored a16z's State of Crypto 2023, which drives much of the confirmation. ZK, L2/rollups, DA (KZG ceremony, proto-danksharding/EIP-4844, danksharding+DAS research), NFTs-as-ownership/identity/reputation (token-taxonomy talk), ETH technical conviction, and the 'fundamentals strong despite price / build through the bear' posture are all strongly and repeatedly confirmed; no claim is contradicted. Account abstraction marked absent: wallet-UX is discussed (Uniswap wallet, embedded wallets) but ERC-4337/smart-contract wallets/social recovery specifically are not. CeFi concern marked absent: a broad pro-self-custody/pro-decentralization ethos is present (open vs corporate networks, DEX>CEX volume) but he never directly addresses CeFi/exchange custody, counterparty risk, or proof-of-reserves; nor does he mention the lender/DCG-Genesis contagion. Reflexive-tokenomics concern judged confirmed at stance level via his token-design critique of 'token-first thinking' and the 'organic vs speculative' framing, rather than via explicit yield/leverage commentary.
